name: RHINO BITCOIN INC.
summary: PART I . Explanatory Note As described below, on August 19, 2025, Rhino Bitcoin Inc. (formerly known as Phoenix Plus Corp.) (the Company) acquired all of the outstanding capital stock of Rhino Digital Inc. (Rhino Digital). The acquisition of Rhino Digital is treated as a reverse acquisition (the Reverse Acquisition), and the business of Rhino Digital became the business of the Company.
